reviews.comment:
Pesima atencion! Te contestan como el orto! Se complotan entre los empleados para defenderse... Nunca un buena atención no?
Por que no se dedican a otra cosa muchachos? Si tanto les rompe las pelotas atender al público!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible attention! They answer you like the ortho! There is a conspiracy between employees to defend themselves... Never good service, right?
Why don't you guys do something else? If it breaks your balls so much to attend to the public!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZeHRTem9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Malísima la atención, se me coló otro vehículo y cuando le dije al playero y al de seguridad, me boludearon y lo atendieron primero.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, another vehicle cut in front of me and when I told the guard and security, they fooled me and served him first.
